creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Dear FreeBSD committer:

I send a patch to update sqldeveloper from 1.2.1.3213 to 1.5.0.53.38:

# cd /usr/ports/databases/sqldeveloper
# patch -p1 < pathToMyPatch.diff
# rm *.orig files/*.orig
# rm files/patch-ide_bin_launcher.sh files/patch-sqldeveloper_bin_sqldeveloper

(the last ones files are not needed anymore).

Please note the following:

1) Dependence with java/javavmwrapper has been removed. I think it is redundant
when USE_JAVA=yes is used.

2) New dependency with databases/mysql-connector-java through OPTIONS.

3) Sadly, shells/bash port is now a required dependency. Sqldeveloper will not
work with /bin/sh shell, as some scripts use arrays.

4) sqldeveloper does not work with the actual jdk 1.6 FreeBSD port. jdk 1.5 is
required.

5) Software release notes:
http://www.oracle.com/technology/products/database/sql_developer/files/relnotes_v15.html

6) In 1.2.1.3213 version sqldeveloper port name was:
sqldeveloper-no-jre-1.2.1.3213

but the new one is
sqldeveloper-1.5.0.53.38

I think that the no-jre suffix should not be included into the name of the
port. Thus, I have removed

PKGNAMESUFFIX=  -no-jre

and I have added:

DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=-no-jre

That approach have a little annoyance: it should be announced in the
/usr/ports/MOVED. I apologize for any inconveniences.



Best regards

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
